pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 8 to 17 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not support the 'release' flag or Java 17 bytecode generation correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the modern release flag for cross-compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with Java 17 is discouraged and may lead to mismatched bootstrap classpaths; release is the standard for JDK 9+.
